stemHtml: To avoid the risk of a tyre burst from overheating, there…

options.a: are thermal pressure relief valves in the wheel hub that reduce the tyre pressure at a specific temperature.
options.b: are thermal plugs in the wheel hub that deflate the tyre at a specific temperature.
options.c: is a thermal pressure relief valve in the inflation valve stem that reduces the tyre pressure at a specific temperature.
options.d: is a thermal plug in the inflation valve that deflates the tyre at a specific temperature.
